summary: Two buildings assessed show NO DAMAGE with CONFIRMED confidence; both exhibit intact facades, windows, and structural elements with no visible signs of impact or deformation. The overall scene depicts a row of ornate, multi-story buildings under clear skies, with no visible damage or disruption to the structures or surrounding area. Given the confirmed absence of damage to the assessed buildings, there is no evidence of functional impact to these targets.
